title: The All-Apple House: A Paradise for Two Toddlers and an Aging Hacker
author: Zachary Proser
description: I wired my new place into an all-Apple smart home: Aqara cameras inside and out, a full eero mesh plus an outdoor repeater, Apple TVs, HomePod minis, smart plugs, and Siri automations. A paradise for two toddlers and an aging hacker. The hardware is solid. Siri is infuriating.
